commands.name: socials
commands.description: When someone asks about social media accounts, Twitter, Instagram, YouTube, etc.
commands.response: Follow us on Twitter @example, Instagram @example, and YouTube at youtube.com/example!

commands.name: rules
commands.description: When someone asks about chat rules, guidelines, or what is allowed
commands.response: Chat rules: 1) Be respectful 2) No spam 3) No self-promotion without permission 4) Keep it English 5) Have fun!

commands.name: specs
commands.description: When someone asks about PC specs, setup, hardware, gear, equipment, peripherals
commands.response: Current setup: RTX 4090, Ryzen 9 7950X, 64GB DDR5, Samsung 990 Pro 2TB. Peripherals: Logitech G Pro X Superlight, custom mechanical keyboard.

commands.name: song
commands.description: When someone asks what song or music is currently playing
commands.response: Current music is from the community Spotify playlist: spotify.com/playlist/example

commands.name: discord
commands.description: When someone asks about the Discord server or how to join the community
commands.response: Join the community Discord at discord.gg/example!

commands.name: rank
commands.description: When someone asks about current game rank, ELO, rating, or competitive standing
commands.response: Current rank: Diamond 2. Peak rank this season: Diamond 1.

commands.name: coaching
commands.description: When someone asks for how they can get private or group coaching to get better at the game
commands.response: For help, please go to this link for coaching
